displayName: Merged Pad Chart Time Series by Window
description: Merged telemetry for pad-level labeller charts. Pad-only views read 120-second rollups, selected-well views read 60-second rollups, and selected-stage views read raw telemetry.
sql: SELECT * FROM ( WITH bounds AS ( SELECT (:start_time)::timestamp - (:context_minutes || ' minutes')::interval AS context_start_ts, (:end_time)::timestamp + (:context_minutes || ' minutes')::interval AS context_end_ts ), scope AS ( SELECT CASE WHEN CAST(:well_name AS TEXT) IN ('', '__ALL__') THEN NULL ELSE CAST(:well_name AS TEXT) END AS selected_well, CASE WHEN CAST(:stage_num AS DOUBLE PRECISION) < 0 THEN NULL ELSE CAST(:stage_num AS DOUBLE PRECISION) END AS selected_stage, CASE WHEN CAST(:well_name AS TEXT) IN ('', '__ALL__') THEN 120 ELSE 60 END AS rollup_bucket_seconds ), pad_wells AS ( SELECT DISTINCT name FROM featurestore:merged_well_index_v1 CROSS JOIN scope sc WHERE COALESCE(NULLIF(fleet_name, ''), 'Unknown') = :fleet_name AND COALESCE(NULLIF(pad_name, ''), 'Unknown') = :pad_name AND (sc.selected_well IS NULL OR name = sc.selected_well) ), rollup_telemetry AS ( SELECT CAST(b2.well_name AS TEXT) || ':' || CAST(b2.bucket_ts AS TEXT) AS telemetry_point_id, b2.well_name, b2.bucket_ts AS timestamp, CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE PRECISION) AS stage_num, AVG(b2.rate_slurry) AS rate_slurry, AVG(b2.press_mainline) AS press_mainline, AVG(b2.selected_concentration) AS selected_concentration, CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE PRECISION) AS context_anchor, COUNT(*) AS records_in_bucket FROM ( SELECT t.name AS well_name, TIMESTAMP 'epoch' + floor(extract(epoch from t.record_ts) / sc.rollup_bucket_seconds) * sc.rollup_bucket_seconds * INTERVAL '1 second' AS bucket_ts, t.rate_slurry, t.press_mainline, CASE WHEN :concentration_feature = 'inline' THEN t.prop_conc_inline WHEN :concentration_feature = 'target' THEN t.prop_conc_target WHEN :concentration_feature = 'auger' THEN t.prop_conc_blend_auger ELSE t.prop_conc_blend_denso END AS selected_concentration FROM datastore:merged_fleet_stream_customer_full_v2 t JOIN pad_wells w ON w.name = t.name CROSS JOIN bounds b CROSS JOIN scope sc WHERE sc.selected_stage IS NULL AND t.record_ts BETWEEN b.context_start_ts AND b.context_end_ts ) b2 GROUP BY b2.well_name, b2.bucket_ts ), stage_windows AS ( SELECT s.name, s.stage_num_td, CAST(s.stage_start_ts AS timestamp) AS stage_start_ts, CAST(s.stage_end_ts AS timestamp) AS stage_end_ts FROM featurestore:merged_td_stage_index_v1 s JOIN pad_wells w ON w.name = s.name CROSS JOIN scope sc WHERE sc.selected_stage IS NOT NULL AND s.stage_num_td = sc.selected_stage ), base_stage AS ( SELECT t.name AS well_name, t.record_ts, sw.stage_num_td AS stage_num, t.rate_slurry, t.press_mainline, CASE WHEN :concentration_feature = 'inline' THEN t.prop_conc_inline WHEN :concentration_feature = 'target' THEN t.prop_conc_target WHEN :concentration_feature = 'auger' THEN t.prop_conc_blend_auger ELSE t.prop_conc_blend_denso END AS selected_concentration FROM datastore:merged_fleet_stream_customer_full_v2 t JOIN stage_windows sw ON sw.name = t.name AND t.record_ts >= sw.stage_start_ts AND t.record_ts <= sw.stage_end_ts CROSS JOIN bounds b WHERE t.record_ts BETWEEN b.context_start_ts AND b.context_end_ts ), raw_stage_telemetry AS ( SELECT CAST(well_name AS TEXT) || ':' || CAST(record_ts AS TEXT) AS telemetry_point_id, well_name, record_ts AS timestamp, stage_num, rate_slurry, press_mainline, selected_concentration, CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE PRECISION) AS context_anchor, 1 AS records_in_bucket FROM base_stage ), td_breaks AS ( SELECT DISTINCT s.name AS well_name, CAST(s.stage_end_ts AS timestamp) + INTERVAL '1 millisecond' AS break_ts FROM featurestore:merged_td_stage_index_v1 s JOIN pad_wells w ON w.name = s.name CROSS JOIN bounds b CROSS JOIN scope sc WHERE s.stage_end_ts IS NOT NULL AND CAST(s.stage_end_ts AS timestamp) >= b.context_start_ts AND CAST(s.stage_end_ts AS timestamp) < b.context_end_ts AND (sc.selected_stage IS NULL OR s.stage_num_td = sc.selected_stage) ), boundary_points AS ( SELECT CAST(w.name AS TEXT) || ':context_start:' || CAST(context_start_ts AS TEXT) AS telemetry_point_id, CAST(w.name AS TEXT) AS well_name, context_start_ts AS timestamp, CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE PRECISION) AS stage_num, CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE PRECISION) AS rate_slurry, CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE PRECISION) AS press_mainline, CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE PRECISION) AS selected_concentration, 0.0 AS context_anchor, 0 AS records_in_bucket FROM pad_wells w CROSS JOIN bounds UNION ALL SELECT CAST(w.name AS TEXT) || ':context_end:' || CAST(context_end_ts AS TEXT) AS telemetry_point_id, CAST(w.name AS TEXT) AS well_name, context_end_ts AS timestamp, CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE PRECISION) AS stage_num, CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE PRECISION) AS rate_slurry, CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE PRECISION) AS press_mainline, CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE PRECISION) AS selected_concentration, 0.0 AS context_anchor, 0 AS records_in_bucket FROM pad_wells w CROSS JOIN bounds ), line_breaks AS ( SELECT CAST(well_name AS TEXT) || ':stage_break:' || CAST(break_ts AS TEXT) AS telemetry_point_id, CAST(well_name AS TEXT) AS well_name, break_ts AS timestamp, CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE PRECISION) AS stage_num, CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE PRECISION) AS rate_slurry, CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE PRECISION) AS press_mainline, CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE PRECISION) AS selected_concentration, CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE PRECISION) AS context_anchor, 0 AS records_in_bucket FROM td_breaks ) SELECT * FROM raw_stage_telemetry UNION ALL SELECT * FROM rollup_telemetry UNION ALL SELECT * FROM boundary_points UNION ALL SELECT * FROM line_breaks ORDER BY well_name, timestamp, telemetry_point_id ) q
